docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-12-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED TO JULY 12, 2012 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY MOHANNA, KEYHAN AS TO DEFENDANT RUSANOFF, OLGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF FILED BY MOHANNA, KEYHAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
